title: Mie Prefectural Museum
summary: Mie Prefectural Museum (三重県総合博物館, Mie-ken sōgō hakubutsukan) opened on a new site in Tsu, Mie Prefecture, Japan, in 2014. Also known as MieMu, it replaced the former Mie Prefectural Museum (三重県立博物館, Mie kenritsu hakubutsukan) which opened in 1953 and closed in 2014.
text: Mie Prefectural Museum (三重県総合博物館, Mie-ken sōgō hakubutsukan) opened on a new site in Tsu, Mie Prefecture, Japan, in 2014. Also known as MieMu, it replaced the former Mie Prefectural Museum (三重県立博物館, Mie kenritsu hakubutsukan) which opened in 1953 and closed in 2014.
